channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump claims vandals damaged D.C. Reflecting Pool, and says it will be drained again
item.description: The president posted on Truth Social claiming vandals slashed the pool's lining and poured chemicals into the water, and said arrests have been made.

item.title: Trump threatens to 'hit Iran very hard again' while Vance in Switzerland for talks
item.description: President Trump has threatened further attacks on Iran while Vice President Vance attended talks with Iranian officials in Switzerland on Sunday.

item.title: Survey finds 9 in 10 fathers had an unexpected emotional response to parenthood
item.description: A new report based on interviews with thousands of fathers reveals many are embracing a role beyond that of provider.

item.title: Russian-held Crimea halts civilian gasoline sales after Ukrainian attacks
item.description: Officials in occupied Crimea suspended gasoline sales to civilians on Sunday as Ukraine intensified strikes on fuel supplies.
